subcodes.first_line: O wanderer of mountain, desert and sea, O thou who art lost in the wilderness of the love of God! In truth, We are most concerned for thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته کوه و صحرا و دریا و گمگشته بادیه محبت الله فی الحقیقه از شما بسیار
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @consolation and comfort, @power of prayer, @love of God
